column1: # Partition table for the CatchChallenger ESP32 server (single big app
# The datapack + settings are compiled into the app image (.rodata)
# NO data/SPIFFS/littlefs partition — only NVS (wifi calibration) + the app.
# 0x2C0000 (2.75 MiB) fits the server + the "test" maincode datapack on a 4 MiB
# flash. A bigger datapack needs a bigger flash + a bigger factory partition.
